name: NCS Multistage Holdings, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview NCS Multistage Holdings, Inc. (NCS, the Company, we, our or us) is a leading provider of highly engineered products and support services that facilitate the optimization of oil and natural gas well construction, well completionand field development strategies.
